ddls:
CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "google_search" TEXT /* Google search query for the researcher's CV */,
  "phd_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the researcher obtained their PhD */,
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the title of the researcher's PhD dissertation */,
  "phd_year_id" INTEGER /* Year the researcher obtained their PhD */,
  "author_score_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking based on author score */,
  "fitted_score_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking based on fitted score */,
  "combined_score_rank" INTEGER /* Combined ranking score */,
  "min_rank" INTEGER /* Minimum ranking across all metrics */,
  "final_rank" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the researcher */,
  "someof" TEXT /* Some search criteria */,
  "noneof" TEXT /* None search criteria */,
  "allof" TEXT /* All search criteria */,
  "name_orig" INTEGER /* Original name as recorded */,
  "cites_of_top_papers" TEXT /* Number of citations of top papers */,
  "url_scholar_local" TEXT /* Local URL to the researcher's Google Scholar profile */,
  "url_from_file" TEXT /* URL from a file */,
  "url_scholar" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's Google Scholar profile */,
  "google_search_cv" TEXT /* Google search for the researcher's CV */,
  "cv_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's CV */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's LinkedIn profile */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID */,
  "scopus_id" TEXT /* Scopus ID */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_phd_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("phd_year_id") REFERENCES phd_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES phd_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_phd_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("phd_institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the institution */,
  "university_type" TEXT /* Type of the institution (public/private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phd_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PhD title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the PhD dissertation title */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the PhD program */,
  "faculty" TEXT /* Faculty of the PhD program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phd_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PhD year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the researcher obtained their PhD */,
  "academic_term" TEXT /* Academic term (fall/spring) when the researcher obtained their PhD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "author_score" INTEGER /* Author score based on publications */,
  "fitted_score" INTEGER /* Fitted score based on a specific model */,
  "combined_score" INTEGER /* Combined score of author and fitted scores */,
  "min_rank" INTEGER /* Minimum ranking across all metrics */,
  "final_rank" INTEGER /* Final ranking of the researcher */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index */,
  "g_index" INTEGER /* G-index */,
  "i10_index" INTEGER /* i10-index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_search_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the search criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the search criterion */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the search criterion (e.g., author, keyword, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "url_scholar_local" TEXT /* Local URL to the researcher's Google Scholar profile */,
  "url_from_file" TEXT /* URL from a file */,
  "url_scholar" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's Google Scholar profile */,
  "google_search_cv" TEXT /* Google search for the researcher's CV */,
  "researcher_website" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's personal website */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's GitHub profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "grant_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the grant was received */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the grant */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second researcher */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the collaboration started */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_fields" (
  "researcher_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-field pair */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_fields_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_universities" (
  "researcher_university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-university pair */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., faculty, researcher, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_universities_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_universities_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
